detailedsolution: Malaria does not primarily target bones or muscles.

questiontext: Kato washes his hands thoroughly before lunch. Why should we wash hands with soap before eating to prevent Polio?
optionb: To kill any polio virus picked up from the environment
hint: Hands carry germs to the mouth.
detailedsolution: Hygiene is key to preventing the faecal-oral transmission of Polio.
